issues.title: Damage spike: enemy dealt 15 dmg (60% of 25 HP) on floor 2
issues.description: At turn seq 172 (floor 2, encounter 2, turn 9), the enemy dealt 15 damage when the player had 25 HP. This is 60% of the player's current HP, exceeding the 50% spike threshold.

evidence.metric: Enemy dealt 15 damage (60% of player's 25 HP)

issues.title: Damage spike: enemy dealt 10 dmg (100% of 10 HP) on floor 2
issues.description: At turn seq 178 (floor 2, encounter 2, turn 10), the enemy dealt 10 damage when the player had 10 HP. This is 100% of the player's current HP, exceeding the 50% spike threshold.

evidence.metric: Enemy dealt 10 damage (100% of player's 10 HP)

issues.title: Player defeated on floor 2, encounter 2 (ember_drake) — impatient profile
issues.description: The impatient player was defeated by ember_drake (mini_boss) on floor 2, encounter 2 after 10 turns. They dealt 38 damage but took 101. Accuracy was 70.4%.

evidence.metric: Defeated on floor 2 by ember_drake (101 damage taken)

issues.suggestedFix: Scale early floor difficulty more gradually
